rationale: Basket vault tests rewritten for the removed DRY_RUN_VAULT/baskets/ auto-write (db87f977): test_basket_dispatch_e2e and test_basket_phase5c_real_data now assert the vault is NOT auto-written and PASS, so both are dropped from the baseline. The 3 test_indicator_registry_sync_hook entries are KEPT as acknowledged environment-conditional TDs: they pass where bash/sh is on PATH (e.g. this run) but fail with WinError 2 (no bash) in the session-close environment; the real pre-push hook + indicator_registry_sync --check pass live. They remain in the baseline so the session-close gate does not falsely block on them in the no-bash environment.
